commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3ed14f5f641afcea58836e9c278f2577c51e35ef)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier` config, tier-aware workspace bootstrap filtering/provenance, extra-bootstrap hook re-filtering, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +120, Tests +293. Total +413 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. The claimed after-fix behavior still needs current-head real proof because the PR body proof predates the opt-in default-path change and disagrees with the current no-override subagent tests.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual maintainer review is needed because the remaining blockers are public prompt-context API acceptance, docs, and contributor proof refresh rather than a narrow automation-safe repair.

target.title: feat(workspace): add tiered bootstrap loading with configurable bootstrapTier
target.body:
Closes #22438

## Motivation

Bootstrap files consume LLM tokens on every session. For users with large workspaces, loading all files into every session тАФ including sub-agents and cron jobs тАФ wastes context window budget on files the agent never references. This PR introduces tiered loading so users can control how much context each session type receives, **reducing unnecessary token usage** while preserving persona consistency where needed.

## What

Introduces a three-tier bootstrap file loading system (`minimal` | `standard` | `full`) with a new `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier` configuration option. Both the `minimal` and `standard` tiers exclude hook-loaded extras (e.g. `packages/*/AGENTS.md` from the `bootstrap-extra-files` hook); `full` keeps everything.

## Why

The current binary split (main=all, subagent/cron=minimal) doesn't support use cases where subagents need persona context or where main sessions should be lightweight. This adds a clean, backward-compatible middle ground that lets users optimize their token budget per session type.

## How

- **`resolveBootstrapTier(sessionKey, tierOverride)`** тАФ resolves the effective tier from session type + optional config override.
- **`filterBootstrapFilesForSession(files, sessionKey, tierOverride)`** тАФ extended with optional tier parameter (backward compatible тАФ no tierOverride = existing session-type heuristic).
- **Hook-source guard** тАФ both `minimal` and `standard` filters check `file.source !== "hook"` before allowlist matching, so a hook-loaded extra whose basename happens to be in the allowlist cannot slip in. This preserves the natural `minimal тКВ standard тКВ full` inclusion order on the real hook path.
- **Config** тАФ `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier` in the zod schema, TypeScript types, labels, and help text.

The `source: "root" | "hook"` provenance field on `WorkspaceBootstrapFile` is the discriminator: root-level bootstrap files keep flowing through `minimal` and `standard`; per-package extras registered via the `bootstrap-extra-files` hook are only reachable through `full`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: tiered bootstrap loading тАФ `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier` (`minimal` | `standard` | `full`) controls which workspace files are injected into each session's context window. Closes #22438. After the latest fix (`2a3faf3151`), the `minimal` tier also drops hook-loaded extras, restoring the natural `minimal тКВ standard тКВ full` inclusion order on the real hook path.

Real environment tested: macOS 26.0 (arm64) on Apple Silicon, Node 24.13.0, pnpm 11.1.0, against the fork branch tip at commit `2a3faf3151`. A reproduction harness at the repo root (`repro-tiered-bootstrap.mts`, not committed) imports the real `src/agents/workspace.ts` from this branch and invokes `filterBootstrapFilesForSession` and `resolveBootstrapTier` against an explicit `WorkspaceBootstrapFile[]` containing both root-loaded files and hook-loaded extras whose basenames collide with the root allowlist.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `git checkout 2a3faf3151` (this PR's head)
2. `pnpm install --prefer-offline`
3. Author the reproduction harness at the repo root, importing `./src/agents/workspace.js` and calling the exported functions directly with a `WorkspaceBootstrapFile[]` shaped like a real workspace (root files + two hook-sourced `packages/*/AGENTS.md` entries).
4. `node ./node_modules/.bin/tsx repro-tiered-bootstrap.mts`

Evidence after fix:

Terminal capture, run live against commit `2a3faf3151`:

```text
$ node ./node_modules/.bin/tsx repro-tiered-bootstrap.mts

===== resolveBootstrapTier(sessionKey, tierOverride) =====
  (no sessionKey)       default=standard  override=minimalтЖТminimal   override=standardтЖТstandard  override=fullтЖТfull
  main session          default=standard  override=minimalтЖТminimal   override=standardтЖТstandard  override=fullтЖТfull
  subagent session      default=minimal   override=minimalтЖТminimal   override=standardтЖТstandard  override=fullтЖТfull
  cron session          default=minimal   override=minimalтЖТminimal   override=standardтЖТstandard  override=fullтЖТfull

===== filterBootstrapFilesForSession тАФ DEFAULTS (no tierOverride) =====
main      , no override (=> standard)  тЖТ  8 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/HEARTBEAT.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/MEMORY.md  [root]

subagent  , no override (=> minimal)  тЖТ  5 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]

cron      , no override (=> minimal)  тЖТ  5 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]

===== filterBootstrapFilesForSession тАФ WITH agents.defaults.bootstrapTier =====
subagent  , tier=standard  тЖТ  8 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/HEARTBEAT.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/MEMORY.md  [root]

cron      , tier=full  тЖТ  10 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/HEARTBEAT.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/MEMORY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/api/AGENTS.md  [hook]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/web/AGENTS.md  [hook]

===== REGRESSION GUARD (hook-source exclusion): standard drops source='hook' =====
input  (1 root + 2 hook, basenames collide with root allowlist)  тЖТ  3 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/core/AGENTS.md  [hook]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/persona/SOUL.md  [hook]

standard tier output (keeps only the root AGENTS.md)  тЖТ  1 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]

full     tier output (keeps everything)  тЖТ  3 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/core/AGENTS.md  [hook]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/persona/SOUL.md  [hook]

===== BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY (no tierOverride passed) =====
  sess=agent:main:main              тЖТ 8 files
  sess=agent:main:subagent:task42   тЖТ 5 files
  sess=agent:main:cron:nightly      тЖТ 5 files

Done.
```

Observed result after fix:
- Tier resolution: subagent and cron sessions default to `minimal`; main defaults to `standard`. Any session honors an explicit `tierOverride`.
- `minimal` (subagent / cron default) returns exactly the 5 root files matching the minimal allowlist. Hook-loaded `packages/api/AGENTS.md` and `packages/web/AGENTS.md` are correctly excluded by the new `file.source !== "hook"` guard committed in `2a3faf3151`. Inclusion order is preserved: subagent default returns 5, override тЖТ standard returns 8 (superset), override тЖТ full returns 10 (superset).
- `standard` drops hook-loaded extras even when basenames collide with the root allowlist (1 file out of 3 in the regression scenario).
- `full` keeps every loaded file (10 of 10 in the full set).
- Backward compatibility row: omitting `tierOverride` yields the documented session-type defaults тАФ main 8, subagent 5, cron 5.

What was not tested: glob expansion of `loadExtraBootstrapFilesWithDiagnostics` against a live filesystem (the harness supplies the `WorkspaceBootstrapFile[]` directly to exercise the filter under study). No behavior with non-default agent roots was exercised тАФ the harness uses the canonical session-key shapes `agent:main:{main,subagent,cron}`.

## Testing (supplemental)

`src/agents/workspace.tiered-bootstrap.test.ts` (14 it-blocks, all passing locally) covers the tier resolution and filtering behavior at the unit level, including the explicit `minimal тКВ standard тКВ full` inclusion guard added with the `2a3faf3151` fix. `src/hooks/bundled/bootstrap-extra-files/handler.test.ts` exercises the end-to-end hook path against real temp directories, including the updated assertion that hook-loaded `packages/persona/SOUL.md` does not slip into a subagent session.

## Changes

- `src/agents/workspace.ts` тАФ `BootstrapTier` type, `MINIMAL_BOOTSTRAP_ALLOWLIST`, `STANDARD_BOOTSTRAP_ALLOWLIST`, `resolveBootstrapTier`, and `filterBootstrapFilesForSession`. Both `minimal` and `standard` filters apply the `file.source !== "hook"` guard.
- `src/agents/bootstrap-files.ts` тАФ `source: "root"` provenance field on the root-load path.
- `src/agents/workspace.tiered-bootstrap.test.ts` тАФ 14 it-blocks; new minimal-tier regression added alongside the existing standard-tier one.
- `src/hooks/bundled/bootstrap-extra-files/handler.ts` тАФ re-applies the tier filter after extras are appended, honoring the configured `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier`.
- `src/hooks/bundled/bootstrap-extra-files/handler.test.ts` тАФ refreshed subagent assertion to expect the corrected hook-exclusion behavior.
- `src/config/schema.help.ts` / `schema.labels.ts` / `types.agent-defaults.ts` / `zod-schema.agent-defaults.ts` тАФ config plumbing for `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier`.
target.author: 882soft

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
